violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood in the kitchen is due for deep cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc… were not maintained in good repair. The vinyl flooring in the kitchen is missing some spots.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. The back door to the outside is missing weatherstrip on the sides.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed employee pouring dirty water in the handwashing sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The vinyl flooring in the kitchen is missing in some spots.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
